name: DEAG Deutsche Entertainment Aktiengesellschaft
summary: DEAG Deutsche Entertainment Aktiengesellschaft, a live entertainment service company, produces and organizes various events and concerts in Germany, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom. The company operates through Live Touring and Entertainment Services segments. It also engages in the touring business; and rock/pop, classics and jazz, family-entertainment, and arts and exhibitions businesses. In addition, the company operates MyTicket and Giantic, a ticket distribution platform for third party content. DEAG Deutsche Entertainment Aktiengesellschaft was founded in 1978 and is based in Berlin, Germany.
